column1:
0x000a4ce0 Congratulations on passing the recruitment
exam! You are now a Space City Hall
employee!
You'll begin your training immediately
in Planet Hanauma.
 
Pilot the all-purpose robot "Robbit"
and respond to the requests of the planet's
residents. Good luck!

0x000a4e04 I'll be your supervisor.
You can call me Chief. Hahaha.
I look forward to working with
you.
0x0009cd90 I was playing outside and I lost track of\nmy house. A nice lady on the street told\nme to ask you for help.
0x0009ce30 This is a big problem. Hahaha.\nPlease deal with it quickly.
